description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized human male figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure is dressed in casual attire, including a jacket, pants, and shoes, with one hand in his pocket and the other hand raised, holding an object that could be a cigarette or similar item. The hair is voluminous and curly, and the facial features are detailed, giving the figure a realistic and expressive appearance. The surface of the sculpture appears to be textured, with visible folds in the clothing and a matte, slightly rough finish. The entire piece is rendered in a dark, metallic gray color, suggesting it is cast from bronze or a similar metal. The base is simple and flat, providing stability and a clear separation from the ground.
description: A life-sized, dark gray metallic sculpture of a casually dressed man standing on a rectangular base, with one hand in his pocket and the other raised, holding a small object.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's detailed facial features, curly hair, and the raised hand holding a small object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the arm bent at the elbow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the overall posture of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the hand in the pocket, and the stance of the legs.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
